MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES RETIREMENT SYSTEM'S IN OPPOSITION TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS FILED BY RESPONDENT SAN FRANCISCO EMPLOYEES RETIREMENT SYSTEM

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER JAMES CAVELLINI'S MOTION FOR PEREMPTORY WRIT OF MANDAMUS IS GRANTED. THE ADMINISTRATIVE LAW JUDGE'S DECISION WAS NOT SUPPORTED BY THE WEIGHT OF THE EVIDENCE. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO REPORTER: ROBERT BALIAN, CSR #5220
